## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming webinar plans.](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track with 207 articles published by Saturday; focus on marketing and insurance document handling](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [SEO performance shows volatility but no major concerns; 40 pages ranking in top 10, 18 in top 20](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Webinar with Miles needs refinement; likely to be pushed out by one week to March 27th for better preparation](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [207 articles to be published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Focus on marketing document handling and insurance document handling](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Diving deeper into previous pillars and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Construction case study sent to Tiago for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Dominic's onboarding in progress for industrial use pages](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Slight dip in clicks, increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [No significant position changes observed](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [40 pages ranking in top 10, 18 in top 20](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Key rankings for relevant terms like "PDF mining," "automated tracking data," "lead research automation"](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Overall website performance curve affected by new content not yet ranking](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [12 opportunities currently being pursued](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Increase in referring domains observed](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Positive results from recent backlinks (e.g., Good Call)](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### Outbound Marketing Updates

  - [Positive replies from financial advisors and agencies (9 replies)](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Adding more beginning agencies to target list](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Upcoming Webinar Planning

  - [Originally scheduled for next week, likely to be pushed to March 27th](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Need for refinement of use case and more practical examples](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Miles currently in Japan, returning next week](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Plan to discuss promotion and finalize details in next week's extended meeting](https://fathom.video/share/msUVGSmZvnuNbNVdjB1KqGhD5S7Euv5t?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
